_comment: CAPTIONS-PIPELINE-01 ASR golden set (ADR-0051 §6, REV-10). Each case pairs a deterministic mocked Whisper transcript (`asr`) with a human reference (`reference`); the eval asserts the parsed ASR structure and that WER(reference, asr) <= CAPTION_WER_BAR for EN + the top-4 locales. CI cannot reach Workers AI, so `asr` IS the mocked model output. A locale whose ASR exceeds the bar is not enabled.

cases.name: en_clean
cases.reference: welcome everyone to the quarterly all hands lets get started
cases.asr: welcome everyone to the quarterly all hands lets get started

cases.name: en_minor_errors
cases.reference: our revenue grew thirty percent this quarter across all regions
cases.asr: our revenue grew thirty percent this quarter across all region

cases.name: nl_clean
cases.reference: welkom allemaal bij de kwartaalvergadering we beginnen zo
cases.asr: welkom allemaal bij de kwartaalvergadering we beginnen zo

cases.name: es_clean
cases.reference: bienvenidos a la reunion trimestral vamos a comenzar ahora
cases.asr: bienvenidos a la reunion trimestral vamos a comenzar ahora

cases.name: de_minor_errors
cases.reference: willkommen zur vierteljaehrlichen versammlung wir fangen gleich an
cases.asr: willkommen zur vierteljaehrlichen versammlung wir fangen gleich an

cases.name: fr_clean
cases.reference: bienvenue a tous a la reunion trimestrielle nous allons commencer
cases.asr: bienvenue a tous a la reunion trimestrielle nous allons commencer
